commands.repair_reason: Draft status plus the protected maintainer label make this a maintainer-review item, not a ClawSweeper repair-lane candidate.; Cleared: The diff adds a bounded session identity parameter and a workflow scenario string; I found no concrete secret, permission, dependency, artifact, or supply-chain regression. commands.review_summary:
The PR threads a live `runSessionKey` through embedded runner tool construction, makes semantic `current` status lookups resolve to that live session, and adds unit, Telegram QA, workflow, and changelog coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and the linked report: current main passes only `sandboxSessionKey` into the tool set, so `session_status({sessionKey:"current"})` resolves through the sandbox requester key. I did not execute the Docker scenario, but the PR comment reports reproducing it against a pre-fix `origin/main` package and passing it against the PR package.
commands.review_followup: Draft status plus the protected `maintainer` label make this a maintainer-review item, not a ClawSweeper repair-lane candidate.

target.title: fix: session_status 'current' resolves to live run session instead of stale sandbox key (#76708)
